Document:
# Rule A2: Quantum Blue is a community # server first and foremost. Be respectful.
Quantum Blue is many things, but our number one priority is maintaining a healthy community. - Above any other rule: consider other people's fun in the way you play. - [color=#ff0000]You may be punished for acting in a way that is unreasonably unfun for other players.[/color] - Be respectful towards other players and avoid making others uncomfortable. - While we deeply value our players' comfort, we're also very well aware of other communities that allow bullying and harrassment to thrive from "comfort" complaints. This attitude won't be tolerated here. - [color=#ff0000]Usage of LOOC, OOC and dead channels to complain or harass other players is strictly forbidden. You may be banned for 2 hours minimum for doing this.[/color] - We have a zero tolerance policy for racism, sexism, homophobia, violence, threats, hate speech, slurs, and other forms of bigotry, discrimination, and harassment. - [color=#ff0000]Failure to comply with this rule will result in community removal.[/color]
[color=#ff0000]If you have any questions or concerns, please ask an admin via the AHelp (F1) chat.[/color]
